_comment: POST /api/v1/applications — podzone-mpc MCP context server on agentsonly (CC-059). Provides Qdrant-backed semantic search for agent context management via MCP SSE transport.
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: cluster-operators' -d @applications/podzone-mpc-agentsonly.json http://localhost:8000/api/v1/applications

_schema_review.name: str — application name, used as namespace + HelmRelease name
_schema_review.cluster: str — target cluster; routes to agentsonly-apps and agentsonly-infra repos
_schema_review.helm_repo_url: str — Helm chart repo (GitHub Pages for MoTTTT/podzone-mpc)
_schema_review.chart_name: str — chart name within the repo
_schema_review.values_yaml: str — inline values; sets Qdrant + Ollama service URLs and collection name
_schema_review.app_repo_url: Optional[str] — GitHub repo for the MCP server source

_note: Requires ghcr-regcred pull secret in podzone-mpc namespace. Depends on qdrant and ollama being Ready. Collection 'agentsonly' must be seeded separately via context-seed MCP tool.
name: podzone-mpc
values_yaml:
imagePullSecrets:
  - name: ghcr-regcred

env:
  qdrantUrl: "http://qdrant.qdrant.svc.cluster.local:6333"
  ollamaUrl: "http://ollama.ollama.svc.cluster.local:11434"
  ollamaEmbedModel: "nomic-embed-text"
  qdrantCollection: "agentsonly"
